titleStmt.title: SII 30.245: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 245. (A.R. No. 596 of 1915.) Sāyāmalai, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Umaiyorupāgīśvara temple-on the west and south walls of the same maṇḍapa Jaṭ. Sundara-Pāṇḍya: year 8+1, Vriśchika, 10, ba.di. 11, Sunday, Hasta: 1131 A.D., Sunday, Nov. 7

summary.p: It registers the gift of lands as tirūnāmattukkāṇi for providing food offerings during morning and noon services to the deity Umaiyōrupāgīśvaramuḍaiya nāyanār by the ūrār. The boundaries of lands are elaborated. Kōṭṭūrkulam, Maḍaippōkku, Paḍaipaṟaippaṟṟu, and the temple of Kulasēkhara Īśvaramuḍayār, are mentioned. Many persons are mentioned as signatories and it is presumed that they should be the members of village assembly.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsundara pāṇḍiya devaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu vṛścikanāyaṟṟu pattān tiyatiyum Aparapakṣattu Ekātaciyum nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ yāṉa kulacekara Ūrom Uṭaiyār Umaiyorupākiśvavaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka muṉṉāḷ caṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa puṉceyāy tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇiṉa nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilattukku poṉvari taru
vatāṉa paṇam nūṟum Innāyaṉāṟkuk kālacantikku Amutupaṭiyāka nāṅkaḷ candrātityavarai kuṭuttamaikkum Ucciccantikku Iṭṭa naṉcey nilamāvatu koṭṭur kuḷattil teṟku maṭaippokkil paṭaipparaip paṟṟukkuc cūḻ Ellaikkuk kiḻellai Uṭaiyār khulaśekhara Īśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku meṟkum teṉellai neṭuṅkiṇaṟu peṟṟa cevvaikku vaṭakkum melellai kucavaṉ maṭaiviruttikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattukkut teṟkum Āka Innāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilamum paṭaippaṟaik kiṇaṟum Ikkoṭṭurk kuḷat
til Innila viḻukkāṭṭāluḷḷa svāsandiyyamum Aṟunirc ceṟunirum nila viḻukkāṭṭile pāyvatākavum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nilamum tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikkuṭuttamaikkum Āka Ivvakaippaṭiyāluḷḷa naṉcey puṉcey candrātityavarai celvatākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom Uṭaiyār Umaiyorupākiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ūrāy Icainta Ūrom Ivai nilaiyuṭaiya pāṇṭiyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Urupanārāyaṇapallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiyākañcīriya paṉmaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai cempiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai naralokaciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puvaṉiciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uttamapāṇṭiya tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pavaṉiyaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai parimelaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cuntarapperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Ivai kaivaḻaṅku pāṇṭiyatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Ūrkkaṇakku vaḻutiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Atikāram Alaivāycuntaraṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟintu kṛṣṇādi pṛtiṣṭān=tameṉun=tayāṉamaikku Abhiṣeka perumāṉāṉa civappurandaraṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.245 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
